RUSTYNESTING

01 / IMPORT DXF

or drag one or more .dxf files here

or add a rectangle directly (a stock sheet size, or a simple rectangular part) without a DXF file:

02 / ASSIGN ROLES

Mark each imported shape as a SHEET (stock to nest onto) or a PART (thing to nest), and set a quantity.

# NAME BBOX (W×H) PREVIEW ROLE QTY DOMINANT?

04 / RESULT

These parts could not be placed on any sheet (outlined in red below and in the list they came from):

Export the attempt currently shown above to a DXF file:

Sheets under this utilisation get auto-repacked in place after a run (same parts, tighter arrangement) - blank turns it off. You can also REPACK any single sheet manually from the RESULT view regardless.

TIGHT FIT (recommended) scores by how snugly a piece touches its neighbors - best for irregular/interlocking shapes. GRAVITY settles pieces like Tetris; BOX/CONVEX HULL score by the overall shape placed so far and plateau earlier on irregular parts. GRAVITY + CORRECTIVE/TIGHT FIT are hybrids. Hover PLACEMENT for the full comparison.

MUTATION %: chance of a random tweak (reordering parts or rerolling a rotation) when breeding two good attempts together - keeps the search from stalling on one arrangement.

90%

DOMINANT AREA: a part alone taking up more than this share of a sheet gets that sheet to itself instead of sharing (still placed) - flagged live as CLOSES SHEET in the shapes table above.

CONSOLE

HOW TO USE RUSTYNESTING

RustyNesting nests parts onto stock sheets before cutting.

  • 01 IMPORT — load DXF file(s), or add a rectangle by hand.
  • 02 ASSIGN ROLES — mark each shape SHEET (stock) or PART (to cut), set quantities.
  • 03 CONFIGURE — adjust margin/spacing etc. at the bottom if needed (optional).
  • RUN NEST — then review and EXPORT the result.

Hover any label for more detail.
